description: Public bottleneck experiment trajectory used by JuPedSim/PedPy documentation for bottleneck-flow comparison.
format: PeTrack text trajectory: id frame x/m y/m z/m
paper_reference: Boltes, Holl, and Seyfried (2020), Data archive for exploring pedestrian dynamics and its application in dimensioning of facilities for multidirectional streams, Collective Dynamics 5, DOI 10.17815/CD.2020.28.
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International for the archive paper; data archive requests source attribution.
known_limitations: Laboratory bottleneck experiment, not a station evacuation drill.
Supports bottleneck-flow and trajectory-ingestion validation only.
Does not validate Chiyoda CBRN hazard physics or operational station predictions.
